name: Chase Freedom Rise℠

welcome_offer.description: $25 statement credit after setting up automatic payments in first 3 months and keeping for 90 consecutive days

earning_rates.notes: 1.5% cash back on all purchases (flat rate)
2% cash back on Lyft rides through September 30, 2027

other_benefits.name: Credit Building
other_benefits.description: Designed for first-time cardholders and those building/rebuilding credit. Chase may approve applicants with no prior credit history.

other_benefits.name: DashPass
other_benefits.description: Complimentary 6 months of DashPass (then $12.99/month) — activated by 12/31/2027

other_benefits.name: Chase Offers
other_benefits.description: Access to Chase Offers for additional cash back at participating merchants

notes: Entry-level card for credit building. Chase may approve applicants with no prior credit history if they have $250+ in a Chase checking/savings account. Higher approval odds for thin-file applicants. No credit history required. Simple flat 1.5% rate is competitive for a starter card.
